input.tenant_message: Three of the interior doors in the apartment have started sticking and one of them won't close at all anymore. The gaps around the door frames look uneven and I can see daylight through a gap at the top corner of the front door frame. This all seemed to happen gradually over the last two months.

ai_output.recommended_action: Schedule a structural inspection within one week to evaluate foundation settlement or framing movement causing the widespread door misalignment. Check for related cracking at wall-ceiling junctions and above door openings. Multiple affected doors simultaneously is a red flag for systemic settlement rather than isolated swelling.
